parameters.query:
-- PLACEHOLDER (parameterise before go-live): durable inbox
INSERT INTO inbox (payload, status, dedup_key, received_at)
VALUES ('{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}', 'pending', '{{ $json.dedupKey }}', now())
ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO NOTHING;

=-- cache the freshly fetched context + stamp freshness
INSERT INTO accounts (name, context, last_verified)
VALUES ('{{ $json.account }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.context) }}', now())
ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET context = EXCLUDED.context, last_verified = now();

=-- linked feedback for this account (no vectors yet)
SELECT verdict, correct_type, reason FROM feedback
WHERE account_id = (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE name = '{{ $('Normalize + Dedup').item.json.account }}')
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;

=-- store the call on the tree (account -> project -> CALL -> signal), return its id
INSERT INTO calls (account_id, title, transcript, source, call_date, dedup_key)
VALUES ((SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE name = '{{ $('Normalize + Dedup').item.json.account }}'),
        'Call {{ $('Normalize + Dedup').item.json.callId }}',
        '{{ $('Normalize + Dedup').item.json.transcript }}',
        '{{ $('Normalize + Dedup').item.json.source }}',
        '{{ $('Normalize + Dedup').item.json.callDate }}',
        '{{ $('Normalize + Dedup').item.json.dedupKey }}')
ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO UPDATE SET transcript = EXCLUDED.transcript
RETURNING id;

options.systemMessage: You are Tecknuovo's delivery intelligence analyst. Read the call transcript and extract ONLY the signals that matter to delivery, using the known context and prior corrections to classify accurately. Return ONLY valid JSON, no prose, in exactly this shape: {"signals":[{"type":"risk|opportunity|update|people","summary":"one line","quote":"exact words from the transcript","suggested_action":"one line","confidence":0.0}]}. Use only those four types. If nothing is material, return {"signals":[]}.

parameters.query:
=-- file each signal (status 'review' = low confidence, routed to human in Observability)
INSERT INTO signals (account_id, call_id, type, summary, quote, suggested_action, confidence, status)
VALUES ((SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE name = '{{ $json.account }}'),
        {{ $json.callId ? "'" + $json.callId + "'" : 'NULL' }},
        '{{ $json.type }}', '{{ $json.summary }}', '{{ $json.quote }}',
        '{{ $json.suggested_action }}', {{ $json.confidence || 0 }}, '{{ $json.status }}');
